videos.title: Acute lacunar infarction basal ganglia
videos.source: First Look MRI - Power to the Patient
videos.relevance: Case-based DWI and ADC explanation for acute lacunar infarction in the basal ganglia.

videos.title: Chronic Microvascular Ischemic White Matter Disease of the Brain on MRI
videos.relevance: Useful background for chronic small-vessel disease context and report phrasing around WMH that can coexist with lacunes.

videos.title: Vascular territories and typical appearance of acute infarcts
videos.relevance: Vascular territory and acute infarct teaching useful for distinguishing lacunar from territorial and watershed infarcts.

videos.title: Stroke Imaging - Case 1
videos.relevance: CT/CTA/CTP/MRI stroke workflow case useful as contrast with larger territorial infarcts.

videos.title: Diffusion Weighted Imaging (DWI) in Neuroradiology... made easy!
videos.relevance: Explains DWI, ADC, true restriction, and T2 shine-through for interpreting acute small infarcts.

videos.title: MRI in Acute Infarct - Role of Diffusion Weighted Imaging (DWI)
videos.relevance: MRI DWI teaching for acute infarct detection, useful for lacunar acute-phase interpretation.

videos.title: Imaging approaches for acute ischemic stroke
videos.relevance: Acute stroke imaging overview useful for modality and workflow context around lacunar versus nonlacunar stroke.

videos.title: AHA/ASA Early Management of Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke 2026 Update - Key Messages
videos.relevance: High-level acute ischemic stroke guideline update context; supports workflow orientation, not lacunar-specific claims.

videos.title: ESO Guideline on Cerebral Small Vessel Disease, Part 2, Lacunar Ischaemic Stroke
videos.relevance: Lacunar ischemic stroke guideline teaching by J. M. Wardlaw; high-value candidate for transcript review.

videos.title: Stroke (lecture 8): Lacunar Stroke
videos.relevance: Covers lacunar stroke causes, clinical syndromes, and rehabilitation learner framing.

videos.title: Types of Ischemic Stroke; Embolic Stroke, Lacunar Stroke, Atherothrombotic Stroke
videos.relevance: Useful contrastive teaching for lacunar versus embolic and atherothrombotic stroke categories.

videos.title: Understanding Ischemic Stroke: Causes, Symptoms, Diagnosis, and Treatment
videos.relevance: General ischemic stroke teaching that includes lacunar stroke, basal ganglia, hypertension/diabetes, and watershed contrast.

videos.title: Stroke
videos.source: Eric Strong / Stanford Medicine 25 style education
videos.relevance: General ischemic stroke subtype teaching including lacunar strokes as small subcortical infarcts.

videos.title: ACV isquemico
videos.relevance: Spanish-language ischemic stroke teaching with lacunar infarct pathophysiology and MRI/FLAIR discussion; candidate only until transcript reviewed.

videos.title: ESOC 2021: Small vessel disease is a key area of stroke research
videos.relevance: Joanna Wardlaw discussion of small vessel disease as a major stroke and dementia research area; supports strategic context.
